title: Fire Insurance – Ceylinco Insurance
content:
Ceylinco Gedara
Fire Insurance and Allied Perils cover for the Building and its content only for a fixed premium of Rs.7,500/- for the whole year!
Read More
Ceylinco Home Owner’s Disaster Relief  Insurance
Read More
Ceylinco Dwelling Fire
Provided to households to allay a number of fears and threats. Coverage can be picked and chosen by the policyholder.
Benefits :
Compensation is provided for fire and allied perils, depending on the sum insured.
Read More
Home and You
This unique product includes covers such as Fire and related perils, cover against Natural disasters for the House and its contents and a free Personal Accident cover for the insured at a nominal premium. It also offers the insured the flexibility to cover the building together with contents, just the building or just contents only.
